name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M15056] The Cookie BB Tote is crafted from Monogram coated canvas, featuring contrasting leather trim to highlight the crescent shape. The lightweight design combines an adjustable handle and a detachable chain, allowing for effortless conversion between shoulder and crossbody styles. Connect the ends of the tote to create a trendy wristlet look. 19 x 5 x 28.5 cm (H x W x D)
